title: Proclamation No. 367, s. 1939
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 367

RESERVING FOR WATERSHED PURPOSES A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF YAGANAC, MUNICIPALITY OF CALAUAG, PROVINCE OF TAYABAS, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for watershed purposes, under the administration of the municipality of Calauag, Tayabas, subject to private rigths if any there be, the following-described parcel of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Yaganac, municipality of Calauag, Province of Tayabas, Island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Mr—222, to wit:

Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Mr-222, S. 77° 27′ E. 1,982.95 m., more or less, from B. L. B. M. No. 2, barrio of Yaganac, municipality of Calauag, thence N. 74° 24′ E. 124.33 m. to point 2; N. 59° 48′ E. 74.35 m, to point 3; N. 55° 31′ E. 113.64 m. to point 4; N. 88° 45′ E. 207.90 m. to point 5; N. 69° 26′ E. 145.09 m. to point 6; S. 73° 10′ E. 44.75 m. to point 7; S. 73° 28′ E. 66.10 m. to point 8; S. 54° 21′ E. 54.97’m. to point 9; S. 31° 24′ E. 62.42 m. to point 10; S. 20° 54′ E. 125.10 m . to point 11; S. 0° 14′ E. 55.15 m. to point 12; S. 62° 45′ E. 67.23 m. to point 13; S. 45° 49′ E. 28.14 m. to point 14; S. 35° 22′ E. 57.60 m. to point 15; S. 24° 59′ E. 59.50 m. to point 16: S. 10° 01′ W. 70.20 m. to point 17; S. 6° 04′ E. 92.76 m. to point 18; S. 47° 54′ E. 114.59 m. to point 19; S. 19° 44′ W. 112.94 m. to point 20; S. 3° 16′ E. 50.24 m. to point 21; S. 62° 04′ W. 26.54 m. to point 22′; S. ’27° 45′ W. 7.97 m. to point 23; S. 3° 24′ E. 72.08 m. to point 24; S. 24° 19′ E. 80.94 m. to point 25; S. 35° 00′ E. 83.91 m. to point 26; S. 9° 46′ E. 136.64 m. to point 27; S. 53° 28′ E. 71.84 m. to point 28; S. 57° 28′ E. 82.93 m. to point 29; S. ! 39° 04′ E. 78.85 488 to point 30; S. 33° 49′ E. 37.93 m. to point 31; S. 20° 49′ E. 85.46 m. to point 32; S. 26° 41′ E. 62.00 m. to point 33; S. 64° 31′ E. 12.83 m. to point 34; S. 23° 08′ W. 12.47 m. to point 35; S. 75° 16′ E. 74.14 m. to point 36; S. 17° 39′ W. 46.29 m. to point 37; S. 60° 01′ W. 6.00 m. to point 38; S. 23°. 16′ E. 144.97 m. to point 39; S. 8° 18′ E. 14.97 m. to point 40; N. 81° 34′ W. 243.61 in. to point 41; S. 74° 50′ W. V45 86 m. to point 42′; S. 47° 31′ W. 226.26 m. to point 43; S. 55° 05′ W. 158.73 m. to point 44; S. ’67° 35′ W. 143.01 m. to point 45; S. 85° 57′ W. 241.48 m. to point 46; S. 84° 23′ W. 91.58 m. to point 47; S. 73° 01′ W. 152.28 m. to point 48; S. 81° 44′ W. 190.56 m. to point 49; S. 86° 32′ W. 146.95 m. to point 50; N. 26° 04′ W. 240.40 m. to point 51; N. 41° 39′ W. 281.64 m. to point 52; N. 52° 31′ W. 315.33 m. to point 53; N. 9° 37′ W. 79.34 m. to point 54; N. 13° 32′ W. 284.14 m. to point 55; N. 16° 21′ W. 87.66 m. to point 56; N. 17° 35′ W. 164.00 m. to point 57; N. 8° 47′ E. 167.39 m. to point 58; N. 4° 48′ W. 126.03 m. to point 59; S. 85° 33′ E. 148.92 m. to point 60; S. 89° 46′ E. 240.30 m. to point 61; N. 75° 48′ E. 155.48 m. to point 62; N. 54° 26′ E. 138.31 in. to point 63; N. 44° 43′ E. 114.21 m. to point 64; N. 33° 10′ E. 156.95 m. to point 65; N. 18° 05′ W. 172.38 m. to point 66; N. 86° 26′ E. 151.39 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 327.8577 hectares.

Points 28, 48, 59, 60, 62, and 63, galvanized iron spikes in trees; point 65, B. L. concrete monument; point 66, old B. L. concrete monument; points 6 to 38, inclusive, on bank of Hinabaan River; points 44 and 45, on bank of Suha Creek.

Bounded on the north by properties claimed by Hilario Espinosa, Aquilino Florido, Quiterio Camara, Pedro Fulgar vs. Eriberto Labaco and Jose Olbliga vs. Natividad de Dios; on the east, by Hinabaan Eiver and public land (forest zone); on the south, by public land (forest zone) and property claimed by Domingo Florido; and on the west, by properties claimed by Salvador Paulino, Nemesio Mayo, Escolastico Umandab, Rosendo Capunon, and Catalino Silverio.

Bearings true. Declination, 0° 54′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Mr-2’22.

Surveyed: November 14-29, 1930.

Approved: October 19, 1931.

NOTE.—All corners not otherwise described are P. L. S. concrete monuments, 15 by 60 cm.

This is lot No. 3881 of Calauag cadastre, case No. 4.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this second day of January, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-nine, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fourth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: ELPIDIO QUIRINO Secretary of the Interior

Source: Legislative Library, House of Representatives
